name: LP-Notes
description: [LP-Notes](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9036) is a C/C++ Windows credential stealer used by [MuddyWater](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0069). [LP-Notes](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9036) was named after the `lp-notes.txt` file that is used to store stolen credentials.(Citation: ESET_
